amplifyuibuilder.form.CfnAbout: The AWS::AmplifyUIBuilder::Form resource specifies all of the information that is required to create a form.

amplifyuibuilder.form.AppId.Description: The unique ID of the Amplify app associated with the form.

amplifyuibuilder.form.Cta.Description: The `FormCTA` object that stores the call to action configuration for the form.

amplifyuibuilder.form.DataType.Description: The type of data source to use to create the form.

amplifyuibuilder.form.EnvironmentName.Description: The name of the backend environment that is a part of the Amplify app.

amplifyuibuilder.form.Fields.Description: The configuration information for the form's fields.

amplifyuibuilder.form.FormActionType.Description: Specifies whether to perform a create or update action on the form.

amplifyuibuilder.form.LabelDecorator.Description: Specifies an icon or decoration to display on the form.

amplifyuibuilder.form.SchemaVersion.Description: The schema version of the form.

amplifyuibuilder.form.SectionalElements.Description: The configuration information for the visual helper elements for the form. These elements are not associated with any data.

amplifyuibuilder.form.Style.Description: The configuration for the form's style.

amplifyuibuilder.form.Tags.Description: One or more key-value pairs to use when tagging the form data.
